_readme: Shared excavation state for the discovery loop — read/advance via scripts/rotation.py. Committed so any agent/machine resumes where the last one stopped. History of what is already mined lives in git log + manifest.jsonl.

find_books.note: OAPEN all-language since 2026-07-09 (offsets 0-350 were mined English-only before that; the all-language re-walk restarted at 0)

find_patents.note: weekly buckets 1900..now walked BACKWARDS one ISO week per advance; already mined: 2017-2020 W01, 1925/1930/1935/1940 W01; yearly buckets exist only pre-1900

find_ibpsa.note: PAUSED — rate-triggered sgcaptcha poisons bulk fetches; needs slow pacing (~1 req/2-3s) before re-enabling; bs series biennial 1985-2025

find_sdz.note: run with --pages 5 per series; sdz ends ~p16, hdz ~p25; --series sdz|hdz (both mined in parallel from p1 on 2026-07-09)

find_ademe.note: run with --pages 4; categories: 3153-batiment (504 results, mined p1-4), 3149-energies (p1-2), 3509-urbanisme (untouched); license=open (non-commercial reuse w/ attribution)

find_kitopen.note: MANUAL pointer: each run prints '# next-token: <t>' — paste it here ('END' = ddc:690 set exhausted, 9,346 records total, ~26% pass the fail-closed CC filter). Do NOT use rotation.py advance for this one.

find_japan.note: MANUAL-ish: nilim years 2020-2025 mined 07-09 (next: --series nilim --start 2014 --count 6); bri reports 139-158 mined (new reports appear at the top: retry --start 157 occasionally); bri 1-138 have no PDFs; 建築研究資料 series (data.html, up to No.214) is an UNMINED sibling vein

find_wiki.note: category mode: depth 1 x lang-cap 250 mined 07-09 for zh,de,fr,ja,es,ru,ko,it; next round try --depth 2 --lang-cap 400 (expect drift, gate handles); langlinks mode saturated for current curated set; --books zh done
